description: FLUX.1-schnell + miniature-people LoRA (iliketoasters) — photorealistic tiny/miniature figures in real-world scenes
_comment: LoRA trained with fluxgym on FLUX.1-schnell base. Designed to overcome the 'plastic figure' problem when generating miniature-scale people. V1 — author plans further iterations.
_comment_model: Base model: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell — CFG-distilled 12B rectified-flow DiT. Gated: HF token required.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORDS (use one per prompt, as appropriate): 'miniature man', 'miniature woman', 'miniature people'. These are the trained tokens.
_comment_prompting: IMPORTANT prompting tips from model card: describe the scene in a way that implies scale (e.g. 'miniature man standing next to a truck tire' not just 'next to a truck'). Mentioning real-world reference objects (keyboard, coin, counter) greatly improves scale perception. Closeups do not work well in v1. If clothing is not described, plaid patterns may appear.
_comment_guidance: FLUX.1-schnell is CFG-distilled → guidance_scale MUST be 0.0.
_comment_steps: 4 steps is the schnell sweet spot. 1–8 steps are valid.
_comment_size: 1024x1024 is the FLUX native resolution. Landscape (1024x768) can work well for scene shots.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory — FLUX transformer is ~12 GB in bfloat16.
